'''Lag Mettier''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] ground crew officer stationed at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] around the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and was captured during the battle.

After his capture, he was transferred to ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'', where he spent several years before being sent, along with several other prisoners, to the [[Xenovet]] facility on [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] to be disposed of.

He, along with most of the other prisoners, were rescued in a joint operation between [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and the [[Katarn Commandos]].

Before his capture, he knew Rogue Squadron pilot [[Dak Ralter/Legends|Dak Ralter]].
